form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编号] orgId[业务组织] drpLineId[DRP行] =========>link[关联移动单]====== inboundMoveId[入站移动单] outboundMoveId[出站移动单] =========>bill[关联单据]====== sourceBillType[来源单据类型] sourceBillCode[来源单据号] targetBillType[目标单据类型] targetBillCode[目标单据号] =========>detail[执行详情]====== materialId[物料] quantity[越库数量] stagingLocationId[暂存库位] dockSlotTime[月台时间窗口] status[状态] matchedAt[匹配时间] loadedAt[装车完成时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[编号] orgId[业务组织] drpLineId[DRP行] =========>link[关联移动单]====== inboundMoveId[入站移动单] outboundMoveId[出站移动单] =========>bill[关联单据]====== sourceBillType[来源单据类型] sourceBillCode[来源单据号] targetBillType[目标单据类型] targetBillCode[目标单据号] =========>detail[执行详情]====== materialId[物料] quantity[越库数量] stagingLocationId[暂存库位] dockSlotTime[月台时间窗口] status[状态] matchedAt[匹配时间] loadedAt[装车完成时间] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[编号] orgId[业务组织] drpLineId[DRP行] status[状态]
